title: Company Data Enricher Input
description: Enrich B2B company data from domains, company names, or Wikidata IDs. Extract website metadata, social profiles, tech stack, contact info, and domain registration data -- all from free public sources.

domains.title: Company Domains
domains.description: List of company domains to enrich (e.g. 'stripe.com', 'shopify.com'). Returns metadata, social links (LinkedIn, Twitter, GitHub), contact info, technology stack (28 technologies), and RDAP domain registration info. No API keys needed.

queries.title: Company Name Search Queries
queries.description: Search companies by name via Wikidata (e.g. 'Google', 'Apple Inc'). Returns structured company data: founded date, HQ location, CEO, industry, and employee count.

wikidataIds.title: Wikidata Entity IDs
wikidataIds.description: Direct Wikidata entity lookup (e.g. 'Q95' for Google, 'Q312' for Apple). Returns comprehensive structured company data from the world's largest free knowledge graph.

mode.title: Enrichment Mode
mode.description: For domain inputs: 'enrich' returns full enrichment (metadata + tech stack + social profiles + contacts + RDAP). 'domain' returns basic metadata + RDAP only (faster, lower compute cost).
enumTitles: Full Enrichment (metadata + tech stack + social + contacts + RDAP)
Domain Lookup Only (metadata + RDAP, faster & cheaper)

delayMs.title: Delay Between Requests (ms)
delayMs.description: Milliseconds to wait between each request. Lower = faster but higher risk of rate limiting. Recommended: 500-2000ms.
